panels.description: Wide angle shot looking out from a dark, cramped underground burrow into a sunlit, ruined landscape. A mass of black crows is visible in the distance, tearing at skeletons on the edge of a deep pit. Dust motes dancing in the light.

bubbles.text: Except in the corner, where a multitude of crows fought over the skeletons, there was not a living thing.

panels.description: Extreme close-up of a human eye peering through a crack in rubble, dilated pupil reflecting the harsh light, sweat on brow, visible tremors, high contrast shadows.
Medium shot from behind, protagonist emerging from a mound of red weed and shattered brick. The protagonist is looking in all directions, face gaunt, expression of pure, desperate fear.

bubbles.text: Where are they? Is this really my chance?

panels.description: Close up of trembling hands clutching jagged debris, then a shot of the protagonist standing atop the mound, heart visibly pounding against their shirt.

Low angle panoramic shot: a decimated city street with ruined white houses covered in red cactus-like plants and red thread vines. A gaunt, mangy cat is visible slinking in the shadows near a broken wall.

bubbles.text: The houses are skeletons of what they once were, now choked by the red weed.
